scenes.prompt: Photorealistic cinematic photograph of an American diner interior matching image1 layout. Male waiter (image2) in ruby red blouse, black pants, and white waist apron rolls his shoulder while carrying a bus tub past the counter, talking to brunette young woman (image3) in faded black t-shirt, black pants, and black bib apron with red Ruby's Diner script who leans against the counter facing him. Behind the cash register: male clerk (image4) in white button-up shirt and black pants. On the diner floor serving tables: blonde female waitress (image5) in ruby red blouse, black pencil skirt, and white waist apron. Customers seated in red booths. Warm afternoon light. No customers behind counter.
